objective: Play a search result identified by a CandidateRef from a prior music.search.results OperationResult artifact. Validates liveness preconditions (window_ref + anchor_recheck) before clicking, then delegates to the same row-activation + play-press + verify chain as play_visible_row.v0. The caller must extract anchor_text from the chosen Candidate's target_spec before invoking this recipe.

source_run_id.note: run_id of the run that produced the OperationResult candidate-set artifact.

source_artifact_id.note: artifact_id of the OperationResult JSON within source_run_id. Default is artifact_0003 (music.search.results always produces it at index 3).

candidate_local_id.note: candidate_local_id within the OperationResult to validate and play.

anchor_text.note: Caller-extracted anchor text from Candidate.target_spec.anchor_text. Used to click the result row via window-scoped OCR.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
source_run_id and source_artifact_id point to a valid OperationResult from music.search.results.
anchor_text has been extracted by the caller from the chosen Candidate.target_spec.anchor_text.
The search result surface must still be visible (not navigated away) when this recipe runs.

notes: Play press (debug.smartPress) may take the AX path (no pointer disturbance) or fall back to pointer.

expected_signals: debug.clickWindowText confirms the anchor text was found and clicked in the window.
debug.smartPress completes for the play control via AX or pointer fallback.
debug.verifyNowPlayingTitle confirms ${target_title} from the AX tree.
success_criteria: Candidate liveness preconditions pass (window present, anchor visible).
The result row is activated through window-scoped OCR anchor click.
The current now-playing title is verified through the AX tree.
non_goals: This recipe does not perform the initial search — it consumes an already-produced OperationResult.
This recipe does not select which candidate to play — that decision is made by the caller.
This recipe does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary anchor texts.

known_limits.caller_must_extract_anchor_text: The caller (agent) must read the OperationResult artifact and extract anchor_text from the chosen Candidate.target_spec.anchor_text before invoking this recipe. The recipe cannot do this extraction itself because recipe variables are not updated from step signals.
known_limits.click_row_uses_screen_ocr_fallback: debug.clickWindowText uses window-scoped OCR to find the anchor text. If the anchor text appears in multiple rows, match_index 0 is used (first match). The candidate's region_hint is not currently passed to constrain the search.
known_limits.liveness_anchor_recheck_requires_window_: Anchor recheck in music.validate.candidate.liveness requires window_ref.app_bundle_id; candidates produced by music.search.results always include this.
